message:
fix(core): persistence bug fixes (bd-2536, bd-1702) + test coverage

- Fix BLOB X'...' hex literal round-trip through persistence (bd-2536)
- Fix reserved-word column names causing ParseError on reload (bd-1702)
- Add persistence tests: reserved words, reserved table names, BLOB round-trip
- Update harness E2E test to exercise both fixed scenarios
- Sync beads state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
